summary: Validated the 3 user-reported fixes: (1) HomePage section order inversion (Promo Vacances above Hero); (2) Pack pre-fill & lock for 4 booking packs; (3) Critical 'Continuer' button validation on BookingPage. All fixes work as expected. Backend /api/promo-vacances correctly returns included_games/included_players.
critical_code_review_comments: BookingPage.jsx is 1012 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend extracting Step1/Step2/Step3 into separate components and moving Kkiapay logic to a custom hook (useKkiapay).
promo_vacances.py creates its own AsyncIOMotorClient at module level (line 27) instead of reusing the shared DB client from server.py — duplicated connection pool, minor resource waste.
Phone validation message text says 'commence par 0' but accepts any 10-digit starting with '0' — message is correct but could explicitly remind users about MTN/Moov/Celtiis prefixes for clarity.
test_credentials: admin / Nikeland2026 (not exercised — not needed for these 3 fixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BookingPage 'Continuer' validation: phone must be 10 digits starting with '0' OR 8 digits (legacy). Name >= 2 chars. Pack pre-fill via ?pack=<id> uses GET /api/promo-vacances and sets numberOfPlayers/numberOfGames via included_players/included_games (null on promo_vacances_25 → selectors stay enabled). HomePage DOM order: PromoVacancesSection at ~40px, hero-section at ~820px.

verification_details.continuer_button: 0197000000→enabled, 0297123456→enabled, 97000000→enabled (8-digit legacy), 1234→disabled, abc→filtered to empty→disabled, name='J'→disabled even with valid phone. Click on Continuer transitions to step-2 (calendar visible).
verification_details.pack_solo_fun: Banner shows 'Pack Solo Fun Maxo', players=1 joueur (locked), games=1 partie (locked)
verification_details.pack_duo_snack_vr: Banner shows 'Pack Duo Snack VR', players=2 joueurs (locked), games=1 partie (locked)
verification_details.pack_fun_maxo_vacances: Banner shows 'Pack Fun Maxo Vacances', players=2 joueurs (locked), games=1 partie (locked)
verification_details.promo_vacances_25: Selectors remain ENABLED (data-disabled absent) as expected (included_games/included_players are null)
verification_details.homepage_order: Promo Vacances y=40px ABOVE Hero y=820px
verification_details.backend_promo_vacances: All 5 packs returned with correct included_games/included_players fields (4 packs with values, promo_vacances_25 with None)
